summary: Cloned the existing hemicycle monorepo, wired its web demo app into the homelab deployment workflow (deploy script + npm deploy task), added the AI transparency widget, then built and deployed it to hemicycle.dev.gabvdl.xyz via zipgo on raspy2 with Let's Encrypt HTTPS.
prompt:
clone my hemicycle repo from github into my projects and read new project skill to add missing metadata and deployement
deploy & notify
